expectations.text: Skill triggers despite no 'coverage' keyword — uses actual coverage data
expectations.evidence: Baseline explicitly says 'I cross-referenced production source against the seven *.Tests projects' and notes the stale March cobertura summary. Does not produce current per-file coverage %; relies on source/test cross-reference instead

expectations.text: Output is risk/release framed, ties low-coverage files to recent churn
expectations.evidence: Severity-1/2/3 framing tied to release. Mentions recent commits (e.g. 'legacy user login' in 1b5524f)

expectations.text: Names at least 2 specific high-churn low-coverage files
expectations.evidence: Names OpenAiProxyController, OpenAiCallParser, StatisticsService etc. — but identifies them by source inspection, not churn data

expectations.text: Cites concrete coverage % from cobertura, not speculation
expectations.evidence: Acknowledges stale summary and gives no current overall %. Per-file numbers are line-count estimates from source files, not cobertura hit data
